channel.title: Agents on Sergio Méndez Website
channel.description: Recent content in Agents on Sergio Méndez Website

item.title: Presenter, ChatLoopBackOff Episode 75: Exploring Trulens with Shivay Lamba, CNCF, Online
item.description:
In this I presented Shivay in the CNCF show “ChatLoopBackOff Episode 75: Exploring Trulens with Shivay Lamba”

I participated as presenter in this CNCF Show.

Event
